name: predicted-vs-oracle-wide
description: Wide-FOV variant of predicted-vs-oracle: same PPO + curriculum config, but the goal-vector network is the hierarchical 15^3 / strides=[1,2,4] model trained on Theia (val. cosine 0.9968). Pairs with predicted-vs-oracle (baseline 7^3) and oracle-aomic for the 3-way comparison in Section 5.7.
